rationale: In the citing paper, Moe and Trusov (2011) is cited only in grouped references as general evidence that online ratings/reviews can affect sales and as part of the broader online WOM literature. The text does not assign this paper a distinct conceptual role, nor does it build hypotheses, measures, or methods directly from it. The citation therefore functions as background context rather than a specific building block for the paper's core theory or empirical design.
